name: Scout's Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 ounces best quality unsweetened chocolate (recommended brands: Callebaut or Valrhona)
3 tablespoons dark European-style unsweetened cocoa (recommended brand: Hershey's Premium Euro)
1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour (add 2 tablespoons for high altitude)
1 cup chocolate chips (recommended brand: Mrs. F)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (high altitude 375°F).
2. Melt butter with unsweetened chocolate over the top of a double boiler, stirring occasionally. Set aside to cool.
3. Sift together cocoa, flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Beat eggs until creamy, then gradually add sugar, beating constantly.
5. Add vanilla and cooled chocolate-butter mixture. Stir in dry ingredients just until combined.
6. Spread batter into a buttered 9- by 13-inch pan.
7. Sprinkle chips over the surface.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the center no longer jiggles when shaken.
9. Cool before cutting into 32 pieces.
Enjoy!!
